title: Carton Milk
description: Replaces the milk bucket model with a milk carton
body:
**Replaces the milk bucket model with a milk carton**

_**A beautiful milk carton, drink your milk with pleasure :)**_

_I've been wanting to upload this resource pack to Modrinth for a long time, but I only got around to it now._

![Shaun Fenn from Ace Attorney](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7dbd371d69d64a075ca37072df0b753dbed4769.webp)
